2606.20138.title: Learning to Prompt: Improving Student Engagement with Adaptive LLM-based High-School Tutoring
2606.20138.paper_summary: LLMs can personalize education, although current static-prompt tutoring systems struggle to adapt to diverse academic disciplines. We develop and test a system with subject-aware prompting, based on 14 pedagogical features (e.g., tutor scaffolding, student understanding) extracted from raw transcripts. We first train a prompt routing model in a simulation environment, and then deploy it for online adaptation with actual high-school students. The simulation benchmark shows the router outperforming two static baselines ($0.694$ vs. $0.647$ and $0.64$, $p<0.001$). A/B testing ($N=656$ conversations from 359 students) shows sim-to-real transfer where the model switches from analytical to scaffolding learning strategies. Our adaptive prompt selection mechanism improves instructional efficiency, maintains pedagogical quality and reduces interactions by around 3 turns ($p=0.007$). While a greedy router achieves a comparable exercise conversion rate with the baseline ($19.1\%$ vs. $19.6\%$), a stochastic router that samples strategies leads to a higher conversion rate ($28.1\%$).
2606.20138.paper_summary_zh: LLMs 可以個性化教育，儘管當前的靜態提示輔導系統在適應多樣化的學科方面存在困難。<lb/>我們開發並測試了一個基於 14 個教學特徵（例如，輔導者支架、學生理解）的主題感知提示系統，這些特徵是從原始記錄中提取的。<lb/>我們首先在模擬環境中訓練了一個提示路由模型，然後將其部署以實現與實際高中生的在線適應。<lb/>模擬基準顯示，路由器的表現超過了兩個靜態基準（$0.694$ 對 $0.647$ 和 $0.64$，$p<0.001$）。<lb/>A/B 測試（$N=656$ 次對話來自 359 名學生）顯示了模擬到現實的轉移，模型從分析學習策略轉變為支架學習策略。<lb/>我們的自適應提示選擇機制提高了教學效率，維持了教學質量，並減少了大約 3 次互動（$p=0.007$）。<lb/>雖然貪婪路由器達到了與基準相當的練習轉換率（$19.1\%$ 對 $19.6\%$），但隨機路由器通過抽樣策略導致了更高的轉換率（$28.1\%$）。
2606.20138.author: Po-Chin Chang et.al.
2606.20138.authors: Po-Chin Chang, Nicholas Hogan, Aske Plaat, Michiel T. van der Meer
